since_last: 45% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.37%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.94% · Gold +0.82% · Nasdaq100 +0.25%. 45% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.37%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.37%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.02%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.02%, ARM +6.60%, ASML +5.77%, AVGO +5.47%, LRCX +5.36%. Laggards: SNAP -5.52%, AI -3.66%, META -3.41%, PINS -3.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.30% at $189.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
